zh.lifeSummary: Robert Hone於1490年6月2日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆。他於1509年與Lady Johanne Freyne在英國英格蘭戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年在英國戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Hone于1490年6月2日出生在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆。他于1509年与Lady Johanne Freyne在英国英格兰戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年在英国戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文奧特利 聖 瑪麗。

nameMeanings.name: Hone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent stone, especially a boundary marker, from Middle English hone ‘stone, rock’ (Old English hān), the same word as modern English hone ‘whetstone’. Compare Honer .
German (Höne), in part of Sorbian origin: see Hoene and Hoehne .

variants.name: Honer
meanings: English: occupational name for a sharpener of tools, a grinder or honer, from a derivative of Middle English hone ‘whetstone’ (Old English hān ‘stone’) + -er. In Surrey, Sussex, and Hampshire, the name may also have been topographic for someone who lived by a prominent rock or by a boundary stone, from a Middle English derivative of Hone + -er. See Hone .

variants.name: Hones
meanings: English: variant of Hone , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Hone was born on 2 June 1490, in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. He married Lady Johanne Freyne in 1509, in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died in 1543, in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Ottery St Mary, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Hone est né le 2 juin 1490, à Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Lady Johanne Freyne en 1509, à Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1543, à Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Ottery St Mary, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Honeは1490年6月2日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングハルシャムで生まれた。1509年にイギリスイギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリーでLady Johanne Freyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年にイギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリーで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンオッテリー スト マリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Hone(은)는 1490년 6월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 할샤에서 태어났다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 스트 메리에서 Lady Johanne Freyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 영국 데폰 오터이 스트 메리에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터이 스트 메리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Hone nasceu em 2 de junho de 1490, em Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Lady Johanne Freyne em 1509, em Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1543, em Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Hone родился 2 июня 1490 г. в местности холшам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Johanne Freyne в 1509 г. в местности оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1543 г. в местности оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности оттири ст мэри, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Hone nació el 2 de junio de 1490, en Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Lady Johanne Freyne en 1509, en Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió en 1543, en Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Ottery St Mary, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
